rationale: Educ. Code §39.0238 governs scheduling of assessment instruments around religious holy days. It references Tax Code §11.20 (religious organization exemptions), not §11.13(b) (residence homestead exemption). The proposed change to §11.13(b) has no bearing on this section.
quote: "religious holy day or period of observance" means a holy day or a period of holy days observed by a religion whose places of worship would be exempt from property taxation under Section 11.20, Tax Code.
_note: No conflict. The rule cross-references Tax Code §11.20, not §11.13(b). The proposed homestead exemption increase does not affect religious holy day assessment scheduling.
